info.name: Bonneville Power Administration GIS Hub API
Query the BPA Service Area boundary layer

params.name: where
params.description: SQL where clause used to filter features. Use "1=1" to return all features.

params.name: outFields
params.description: Comma separated list of fields to return. Use "*" to return all fields.

params.name: f
params.description: Response format.

items.docs: Query the BPA Service Area boundary layer
